title: Extra Select Premium Rabbit Mix Bucket 5L - Balanced Complementary Feed with Pellets, Forage, Vitamins & Minerals (Packaging may vary)
features: Premium Complementary Feed: Specially crafted blend to support rabbits’ nutritional needs at all life stages.
Balanced Nutrition: Contains 13% crude protein, 8% fibres, and essential minerals like calcium and phosphorus.
Forage & Rabbit Pellets: Includes oatfeed, grassmeal, and pellets to mimic natural foraging behaviour.
Fortified with Vitamins: Enriched with vital nutrients to promote optimal health and overall well-being.
Easy Feeding Routine: Formulated for twice-daily feeding, supporting a healthy and interactive diet.
description: From the manufacturer Extra Select - Premium Rabbit Mix What is Extra Select Premium Rabbit Mix? Extra Select Premium Mix is a top-tier rabbit food, meticulously blended from the finest ingredients. It serves as a complementary feed and offers an array of vital vitamins and minerals to keep your rabbit healthy and in peak condition. Designed for rabbits of all ages, this mix is a go-to choice for a balanced and wholesome diet. Why Rabbits Love It It provides a balanced, palatable blend that satisfies both their taste buds and nutritional needs. The mix combines flavour and health, ensuring your rabbit stays in tip-top condition while enjoying each meal. Handy Hints Foraging Fun: Scatter food in different corners to encourage natural foraging Fresh Veggies & Water: Provide daily fresh greens and always keep water available High-Fibre Treats: Opt for high-fibre treats like hay or small carrot pieces. Nutritionally Balanced Comprising 13% crude protein, 8% crude fibres, and essential minerals, this mix provides a balanced diet that keeps your rabbit healthy and well-nourished. Quality Ingredients Made with concentrate pellets, flaked barley, flaked peas, and more, this mix uses only the highest-quality ingredients to ensure maximum palatability and nutritional value. Rich in Vitamins & Minerals Fortified with crucial vitamins and minerals like calcium and phosphorous, the mix promotes strong bones, a healthy coat, and overall well-being for rabbits of all ages.
